tasks.instruction: Read the descriptions. Match each description (A-L) to the correct sport. Three descriptions do not match any sport.

options.text: Players score points by throwing a ball through a high basket.
A goalkeeper stands in front of the goal and tries to stop the ball.
Athletes ride horses and jump over obstacles in a competition.
Wimbledon in England is one of the most famous tournaments.
Players wear helmets and skate on ice during the game.
The World Cup is the biggest competition in this sport.
Players must hit the ball before it bounces twice on their side.
The court has a three-point line far from the basket.
You need a boat and a paddle to do this water activity.
Games are played in four quarters, and players dribble the ball by bouncing it.
Two teams of eleven players try to kick a ball into a goal.
Two or four players hit a small ball over a net with rackets.
